---
title: "Looped Recurrence Proof Audit"
---

This appendix keeps the theorem-card trail for the [Looped Recurrence Contracts](looped_recurrence_contracts.qmd) lesson. The lesson teaches recurrence schedules as finite contracts; this page is for checking the proof families.

::: {.warning-box}
These cards certify finite loop budgets, exit certificates, active-token boundaries, block routes, recurrent-state closure, and schedule controls. They do not prove recursive reasoning, semantic convergence, model quality, speed, memory savings, context-length improvement, or deployment behavior.
:::

## Recurrence Budget Timeline

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0018"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0019"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0020"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0026"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0027"></div>

## Exit Certificate

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0031"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0032"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0033"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0034"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0084"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0085"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0090"></div>

## Token-Level Recurrence

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0035"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0036"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0037"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0038"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0106"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0107"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0111"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0112"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0113"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0114"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0115"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0116"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0120"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0128"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0121"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0122"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0123"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0129"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0124"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0125"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0126"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0127"></div>

## Work-Budget Accounting

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0130"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0131"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0144"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0145"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0138"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0139"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0132"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0133"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0134"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0146"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0135"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0140"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0141"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0142"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0147"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0143"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0150"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0151"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0152"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0153"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0154"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0155"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0156"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0157"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0158"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0159"></div>

## Middle-Block And Multi-Resolution Routes

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0039"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0040"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0041"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0042"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0043"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0044"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0045"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0046"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0047"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0048"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0056"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0057"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0058"></div>

## Recurrent-State Prototype

<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0049"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0050"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0051"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0052"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0053"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0054"></div>
<div class="theorem-box" data-theorem-id="AIM-T0055"></div>

## Source Trail

<p data-paper-ref="papers/applications/PAPER_AI_02_COIL_ATTENTION_AND_MEMORY.md">Paper source: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/papers/applications/PAPER_AI_02_COIL_ATTENTION_AND_MEMORY.md">Coil Attention And Memory</a></p>

<p>Lean source: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/Circle/Applications/CircleAI.lean">Circle/Applications/CircleAI.lean</a></p>

<p>Python source: <a href="https://github.com/corbensorenson/circle-calculus/blob/main/circle_math/applications/circle_ai.py">circle_math/applications/circle_ai.py</a></p>

<div class="book-navigation">
<a href="looped_recurrence_contracts.qmd">Back: Looped Recurrence Contracts</a>
<a href="physics.qmd">Next: Physics</a>
</div>

<script type="module" src="../../widgets/shared/widget_base.js"></script>
